description: CursorTouch builds AI automation tools that let language-model agents interact with operating systems, browsers, and mobile devices. Its public presence centers on open-source agent tooling for Windows, macOS, Android, and browser automation.
summary: CursorTouch’s public developer surface is open-source/local tooling: three MCP servers (Windows-MCP, Android-MCP, macOS-MCP) plus the `windows-use` Python CLI; no hosted HTTP or GraphQL API was found on cursortouch.com.
